mapper.insert: insert into bms_payable_item (registration_id, item_type, source_id, item_name, amount, paid_amount, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{registrationId}, #{itemType}, #{sourceId}, #{itemName}, #{amount}, #{paidAmount}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select id, registration_id as registrationId, item_type as itemType, source_id as sourceId, item_name as itemName, amount, paid_amount as paidAmount, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from bms_payable_item where id = #{id}

select id, registration_id as registrationId, item_type as itemType, source_id as sourceId, item_name as itemName, amount, paid_amount as paidAmount, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from bms_payable_item where registration_id = #{registrationId} order by id asc

select id, registration_id as registrationId, item_type as itemType, source_id as sourceId, item_name as itemName, amount, paid_amount as paidAmount, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from bms_payable_item where registration_id = #{registrationId} and item_type = #{itemType} and source_id = #{sourceId} limit 1
select count(1) from bms_payable_item where registration_id = #{registrationId} and status <> 1
mapper.update: update bms_payable_item set paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
